'''''Fastooni''''' was a [[C-3 passenger liner]] which contained passengers. The liner, along with a group of other civilian vessels, some of which contained [[Bothan/Legends|Bothans]] who made a reconnaissance mission on the [[Death Star II/Legends|Second Death Star]], was held up by the [[Emancipator|''Accuser'']], which also bought the [[Immobilizer 418 Interdictor-class Heavy Cruiser|Immobilizer 418 cruiser]] [[Grappler (Immobilizer 418 cruiser)|''Grappler'']] to prevent it from leaving. When the Interdictor was driven out by [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebels]] in [[X-wing starfighter/Legends|X-wings]] and [[RZ-1 A-wing interceptor/Legends|A-wings]] all of the ships, as well as the corvette made a run for their [[Hyperspace/Legends|hyperspace]] junctions but were fired upon by the ''Accuser''. Whether or not ''Fastooni'' escaped is unknown.

{{Ship-stub}}
